challenge.title: Korak 4
challenge.description:
Sada kada ste dodali poziv funkcije, možete videti bilo koju grešku kreiranu unutar funkcije u terminalu, i uvek možete koristiti print da biste videli vrednost stvari.

U svakoj liniji je skriven brojčani znak PIN-a, pa unutar funkcije koristite metod split da biste podelili niz u listu linija. Podelite linije po karakteru za novi red (\n) i dodeljujte rezultuju listi promenljivoj nazvanoj lines.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)

tests.text: You should have a variable named lines within your pin_extractor function.
The variable lines should have a value of poem.split('\n').

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poems):
    secret_codes = []
    for poem in poems:
        secret_code = ''
        lines = poem.split('\n')
        for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
            words = line.split()
            if len(words) > line_index:
                secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
            else:
                secret_code += '0'
        secret_codes.append(secret_code)
    return secret_codes

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and
until the end of the night"""

poem2 = 'The grass is green\nhere and there\nhoping for rain\nbefore it turns yellow'
poem3 = 'There\nonce\nwas\na\ndragon'

print(pin_extractor([poem, poem2, poem3]))
